item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: An update to a post from last week
item.description: It's an update to my previous post because people asked Long story short, the police is up the landlords asses and they've been asking me to set up a repayment plan and drop the charges. We've signed a deal so over the next months they have to pay my moving costs, the rent they stole, plus 2 months of rent on top. They agreed so they don't have to go to court. If they don't pay up the lawsuit is gonna be painful for them so they better. I don't like people messing with me. The situation is still kinda tenous and I'm pretty damn broke and often ration food but it will get better with the first installment coming next week Never let people screw you over and get away with it. Though being a big scary dude that just came back from a warzone helps with intimidation :D Edit: I can't respond to all of you, but I tried to cover the broad points about my stuff and all the rest in some of the comments
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.title: Happy Birthday to the Legend - Mel Brooks
item.description:
Melvin James Brooks (né Kaminsky; born June 28, 1926) is an American actor, comedian, filmmaker, and songwriter. With a career spanning over seven decades, he is known as a writer and director of a variety of successful broad farces and parodies.[1] A recipient of numerous accolades, he is one of 21 entertainers to win the EGOT, which includes an Emmy, a Grammy, an Oscar, and a Tony. He received a Kennedy Center Honor in 2009, a Hollywood Walk of Fame star in 2010, the AFI Life Achievement Award in 2013, a British Film Institute Fellowship in 2015, a National Medal of Arts in 2016, a BAFTA Fellowship in 2017, and the Honorary Academy Award in 2024.
No, you don't need to adjust your eyes or your computer screens -- Mel Brooks had 11 fingers when he put his hands and feet in cement at Hollywood's TCL Chinese Theatre on Monday. The comedian brought a prosthetic finger along for the ceremony, held to mark the 40th anniversary of his film "Young Frankenstein." Brooks shared a photo of his handiwork on Twitter, coyly referencing the joke: Later, the 88-year-old director explained the gag during an appearance on "Conan." "I wanted to do something just a little different, I didn't know what," he told Conan O'Brien. "So I got another finger." "Young Frankenstein" celebrates its 40th anniversary later this year.
item.dc:creator: Mapconsuela

item.title: Stonewall was a riot
item.description:
Almost 200000 people at a banned pride demonstration in Budapest, Hungary.
The right wing Fidesz Party (Victor Asshole Urban) forced 2021 a law restricting information on homosexuality and transsexuality has come into force.
Participants could face a fine of up to 500 euros or 585$ (average income 14.500$ in Hungary) under the so-called ‘Pride Parade Prohibition Act’ - the police have the power to use facial recognition software to identify them. The organisers could even face prison sentences.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1396 (laser pigeon)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
The mania has hit hard this morning, I'm trying to make coffee, wash dishes, and make this meme post all at the same time.
Waxwings are notoriously not loud, while the White Bellbird on the right is one of the loudest birds in the world. See here for a video with the vocalization: https://youtu.be/dvK-DujvpSY?si=aGgAFKsaBbOZSDhi
LEGO is bird banding code for Lesser Goldfinch, while EGGO is Egyptian Goose.
My kind of rock shop, and one Sedona desperately needs.
I *THINK* in Modern Greek, this would be "Είθε όλες οι θάλασσές σας να είναι σκούρες σαν κρασί και οι αυγές σας ροδοδάχτυλες. Αμήν." Fuck me if you expect me to try to do Homeric Greek before 7AM.
He was supposed to change them and he forgot so his dad killed himself. What an idiot. Probably should have *Technically* saved this for a Bronze-age dump, maybe I will anyway...
Yet Elephants can't be spelled correctly. But hey, Hannibal also has a lot of shit to do today, maybe he doesn't have time to fix his spelling either.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "merp." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: KatLuvr54

item.title: well done kid
item.description: A young boy with his trumpet (or cornet?) at the No Kings Protest in San Diego, playing the US National Anthem. Reclaiming it. The nationwide 'No Kings' demonstration is one of the top three largest mass protests in American history. True patriotism is fighting against those who seek corruption and fear. Fascists and fascist sympathizers think criticism = hatred, but the real reason we criticize this country is because we know it can be so much better than it currently is. A couple comments on this boy's performance and crowd joining in said: "Mind you, the national anthem is about defending and surviving an attack, not about perpetrating one — how despite the tumult, we persisted bravely and were not defeated, neither literally or in spirit." .. "All my life I’ve HATED the national anthem because it’s never felt real to me. Today? That changed. I now understand what it’s supposed to feel like."
item.dc:creator: trojanbarfare

item.title: Revenge of the Andor Meme
item.description:
Some s2 spoilers if you've not seen it (and a follow up if that applies: what the hell are you doing)
In this house Cinta Kaz is a miracle.
It's weird that Denise Gough is the exact mathematical inverse of Dedra Meero when it comes to being a delightful goof. That's acting.
This is an older meme, but I'm happy to inform you it still checks out.
Some more Andor memes From Before: https://imgur.com/gallery/2LibcoS
item.dc:creator: TheGhostofElizabethShue

item.title: Price - Happy Caturday, for everyone with pet waiting at the Rainbow Bridge
item.description:
The artist is Jenny Jinya. The series is Loving Reaper. This comic can be found at https://m.webtoons.com/en/canvas/loving-reaper/price/viewer?title_no=353275&episode_no=23 Be forewarned, if you head out to her comics, you will cry. A lot. Some of her work is lighthearted, most of her work is very poignant PSA's regarding environmental issues, animal exploitation, and general crap human behavior - from the animals' and Death's perspective.
Happy Caturday All. She still misses her brother.
I miss the best cuddle bug shadow ever.
item.dc:creator: IgnisInvictus

item.title: TheFreePizzaDude is back!
item.description:
Pizza Angels are back to send food to Imgurians in need! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
This has been such a huge help for us to feed more people and we can't thank you enough https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 7pm central
Kevin is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,560 meals since we started 1,123 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 130 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 140 5th, 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 145 8th, 9th, 10th, 11th, 12th and 13th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 155 14th by Pizza Angel @NeelyAdkins 200 15th and 16th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 215 17th, 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st by Pizza Angel @MorganVPI 225 22nd, Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant and 25th by @OP 300 26th, 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @rocmage 325 29th, 30th and 31st by Pizza Angel @Xinihps 335 32nd by Pizza Angel @edowyth 345 33rd and 34th by Pizza Angel @edowyth 355 35th and 36th by Pizza Angel @maddoxonelung 430 37th, 38th and 39th by Pizza Angel @maddoxonelung 450 40th and 41st by Pizza Angel @edowyth 515 The Meaning of Life, the Universe, and Everything by Pizza Angel @SparrowTail3 545 43rd by Pizza Angel @rocmage 615 44th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 635 45th by Pizza Angel @rocmage ... Today's Grocery Tally 125 1st by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 335 2nd by Grocery Angel @edowyth 514 3rd by Grocery Angel @edowyth ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we sent out 45 meals Filled 3 huge grocery orders That's 15,605 meals since we started 1,126 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: "Are there orange stains on the royal sheets?" Dutch supermarket Hema advert
item.description: HEMA is advertising stain remover after Trump stayed at the Royal residence in the Netherlands
item.dc:creator: Timpani

item.title: AOC on how Mamdani's win sends a message to the Democratic establishment
item.description: The people are fed up with the ineffectual Democratic Establishment; Zohran Mamdani's Democratic primary win reflects a growing, immigrant-led politics rooted in global resistance. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez recently told a reporter: - "This isn't just about Mamdani as an individual, this is about the message that the people of New York City are trying to send to our party. The entire Democrat establishment, when given a broad range of candidates to support across all sorts of different ideas, STILL decided to stubbornly choose Andrew Cuomo, when the people are clearly asking for generational change." "At least I'm not Trump" is the bare minimum, it's not gonna cut it anymore, and the people are waking up - the establishment's corny motto of "Vote Blue No Matter Who" was a fucking LIE. "Vote blue no matter who!" until it's a true progressive/ non establishment candidate that voters actually love, then suddenly now it's completely negotiable. Rich Dems got too comfortable. The Democratic old-guard needs to get the memo already: if they won't truly fight for the people against the fascists, they are complicit too. As Bernie Sanders said, "Too many of them would rather be the captains on a sinking Titanic, rather than change course." The old-guard Dems are out of touch, simple as that. Let's stand with the people who aren't in the pockets of wealthy elitists, with leaders that will work for REAL change. We will fight against the MAGA party because our lives, our future depends on it. But to any Democrat who cuddles up to the GOP or is chickening out in front of them while acting so tough on genuine progressives - if we have to fight you too, so be it.
item.dc:creator: trojanbarfare
